text: To generate stable double-transgenic epithelial cell lines for BMP-7 and SMAD5 expression rescue experiments, semiconfluent PAI-1 stable transductants were reinfected with CMV-BMP-7-GFP (LPP-A0309-Lv122) and CMV-SMAD5-GFP (LPP-I0510-Lv122) lentiviral particles, respectively, or CMV-Control vector lentiviral particles (LPP-NEG-Lv105) (GeneCopoeia, Rockville, MD, USA) for 1–2 days in complete medium with Polybrene at 5 μg/mL before stable selection.
